case_title: THOMAS FAN VS. BHUMIL PATEL et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-15-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FAN, THOMAS AS TO DEFENDANT PATEL, BHUMIL DOES 1 TO 100 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-27-2010 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-24-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         AUG-12-2010
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FAN, THOMAS JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF FAN, THOMAS SERVED APR-16-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PATEL, BHUMIL
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON JUL-06-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-27-2010 CONTINUED TO OCT-15-2010 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212, TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S); FILE NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT; OR FILE APPLICATION FOR UNINSURED MOTORIST DESIGNATION. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
